messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"create_or_rewrite_file","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/text-to-diagram/references/excalidraw-schema.md\", \"content\": \"---\\ncreated: 2026-02-06\\nlast_edited: 2026-02-06\\nversion: 1.0\\nprovenance: con_A6c99gs3C9tU3S2O\\n---\\n\\n# Excalidraw JSON Schema Reference\\n\\nFor generating raw Excalidraw files that render with the hand-drawn aesthetic.\\n\\n## Top-Level Structure\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"excalidraw\\\",\\n  \\\"version\\\": 2,\\n  \\\"source\\\": \\\"https://va.zo.space\\\",\\n  \\\"elements\\\": [...],\\n  \\\"appState\\\": {\\n    \\\"viewBackgroundColor\\\": \\\"#000000\\\",\\n    \\\"theme\\\": \\\"dark\\\",\\n    \\\"gridSize\\\": null\\n  },\\n  \\\"files\\\": {}\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Element Types\\n\\n### Rectangle\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-1\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"rectangle\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 200,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"angle\\\": 0,\\n  \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\",\\n  \\\"backgroundColor\\\": \\\"transparent\\\",\\n  \\\"fillStyle\\\": \\\"solid\\\",\\n  \\\"strokeWidth\\\": 2,\\n  \\\"strokeStyle\\\": \\\"solid\\\",\\n  \\\"roughness\\\": 1,\\n  \\\"opacity\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"groupIds\\\": [],\\n  \\\"roundness\\\": { \\\"type\\\": 3 },\\n  \\\"seed\\\": 12345,\\n  \\\"version\\\": 1,\\n  \\\"versionNonce\\\": 12345,\\n  \\\"isDeleted\\\": false,\\n  \\\"boundElements\\\": null,\\n  \\\"updated\\\": 1700000000000,\\n  \\\"link\\\": null,\\n  \\\"locked\\\": false\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Ellipse (Circle)\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-2\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"ellipse\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 100,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Diamond\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-3\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"diamond\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 100,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Text\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-4\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 150,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 25,\\n  \\\"text\\\": \\\"Hello World\\\",\\n  \\\"fontSize\\\": 20,\\n  \\\"fontFamily\\\": 1,\\n  \\\"textAlign\\\": \\\"center\\\",\\n  \\\"verticalAlign\\\": \\\"middle\\\",\\n  \\\"baseline\\\": 18,\\n  \\\"containerId\\\": null,\\n  \\\"originalText\\\": \\\"Hello World\\\",\\n  \\\"lineHeight\\\": 1.25,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**fontFamily values:**\\n- `1` = Virgil (hand-drawn, default)\\n- `2` = Helvetica\\n- `3` = Cascadia (monospace)\\n\\n### Arrow\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-5\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"arrow\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 300,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 150,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 0,\\n  \\\"points\\\": [[0, 0], [100, 0]],\\n  \\\"startBinding\\\": {\\n    \\\"elementId\\\": \\\"source-element-id\\\",\\n    \\\"focus\\\": 0,\\n    \\\"gap\\\": 5\\n  },\\n  \\\"endBinding\\\": {\\n    \\\"elementId\\\": \\\"target-element-id\\\",\\n    \\\"focus\\\": 0,\\n    \\\"gap\\\": 5\\n  },\\n  \\\"startArrowhead\\\": null,\\n  \\\"endArrowhead\\\": \\\"arrow\\\",\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Arrowhead values:**\\n- `null` = no arrowhead\\n- `\\\"arrow\\\"` = standard arrow\\n- `\\\"bar\\\"` = flat bar\\n- `\\\"dot\\\"` = circle\\n- `\\\"triangle\\\"` = filled triangle\\n\\n### Line\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"unique-id-6\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"line\\\",\\n  \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"width\\\": 200,\\n  \\\"height\\\": 100,\\n  \\\"points\\\": [[0, 0], [100, 50], [200, 100]],\\n  \\\"startBinding\\\": null,\\n  \\\"endBinding\\\": null,\\n  \\\"startArrowhead\\\": null,\\n  \\\"endArrowhead\\\": null,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Common Properties\\n\\n### Stroke Styles\\n- `\\\"solid\\\"` = continuous line\\n- `\\\"dashed\\\"` = dashed line\\n- `\\\"dotted\\\"` = dotted line\\n\\n### Fill Styles\\n- `\\\"solid\\\"` = filled\\n- `\\\"hachure\\\"` = hatched lines (hand-drawn feel)\\n- `\\\"cross-hatch\\\"` = cross-hatched\\n- `\\\"zigzag\\\"` = zigzag pattern\\n- `\\\"zigzag-line\\\"` = zigzag line pattern\\n\\n### Roughness\\n- `0` = smooth, clean lines\\n- `1` = slight wobble (default, good balance)\\n- `2` = very sketchy, hand-drawn\\n\\n### Colors (Dark Theme)\\n```\\nBackground: #000000 or transparent\\nStroke white: #ffffff\\nStroke gray: #a1a1aa\\nStroke muted: #71717a\\nAccent blue: #3b82f6\\nAccent green: #22c55e\\nAccent red: #ef4444\\nAccent yellow: #eab308\\n```\\n\\n## Bound Text (Labels Inside Shapes)\\n\\nTo put text inside a shape:\\n\\n1. Create the shape with `boundElements`:\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"rect-1\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"rectangle\\\",\\n  ...\\n  \\\"boundElements\\\": [\\n    { \\\"id\\\": \\\"text-1\\\", \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\" }\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n2. Create the text with `containerId`:\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"text-1\\\",\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\",\\n  \\\"containerId\\\": \\\"rect-1\\\",\\n  \\\"text\\\": \\\"Label\\\",\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Groups\\n\\nTo group elements together (for compound shapes):\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"elem-1\\\",\\n  ...\\n  \\\"groupIds\\\": [\\\"group-1\\\"]\\n},\\n{\\n  \\\"id\\\": \\\"elem-2\\\",\\n  ...\\n  \\\"groupIds\\\": [\\\"group-1\\\"]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## Layout Strategies\\n\\n### Grid Layout\\nFor matrices and tables:\\n- Calculate cell positions based on column width and row height\\n- Add padding between cells\\n\\n### Tree Layout\\nFor hierarchies:\\n- Calculate level depths\\n- Distribute children horizontally\\n- Connect with arrows\\n\\n### Radial Layout\\nFor mindmaps:\\n- Center node at origin\\n- Children arranged in a circle\\n- Use line connections (not arrows)\\n\\n### Force-Directed Layout\\nFor networks:\\n- Start with random positions\\n- Iterate to minimize edge crossings (complex, may simplify)\\n\\n## ID Generation\\n\\nUse UUIDs or random strings:\\n```python\\nimport uuid\\nelement_id = str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]  # Short form\\n```\\n\\nOr use descriptive IDs:\\n```\\n\\\"node-decision-1\\\"\\n\\\"arrow-decision-to-yes\\\"\\n\\\"label-step-3\\\"\\n```\\n\\n## Seed Values\\n\\n`seed` affects the randomness of the hand-drawn rendering. Same seed = same wobble pattern.\\n\\n```python\\nimport random\\nseed = random.randint(1, 999999999)\\n```\\n\\n## Example: Simple Flowchart\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"type\\\": \\\"excalidraw\\\",\\n  \\\"version\\\": 2,\\n  \\\"source\\\": \\\"https://va.zo.space\\\",\\n  \\\"elements\\\": [\\n    {\\n      \\\"id\\\": \\\"start\\\",\\n      \\\"type\\\": \\\"rectangle\\\",\\n      \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n      \\\"y\\\": 100,\\n      \\\"width\\\": 120,\\n      \\\"height\\\": 60,\\n      \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\",\\n      \\\"backgroundColor\\\": \\\"transparent\\\",\\n      \\\"fillStyle\\\": \\\"solid\\\",\\n      \\\"strokeWidth\\\": 2,\\n      \\\"roughness\\\": 1,\\n      \\\"boundElements\\\": [{\\\"id\\\": \\\"start-text\\\", \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\"}]\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\\"id\\\": \\\"start-text\\\",\\n      \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\",\\n      \\\"x\\\": 130,\\n      \\\"y\\\": 115,\\n      \\\"text\\\": \\\"Start\\\",\\n      \\\"fontSize\\\": 20,\\n      \\\"fontFamily\\\": 1,\\n      \\\"containerId\\\": \\\"start\\\",\\n      \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\"\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\\"id\\\": \\\"arrow-1\\\",\\n      \\\"type\\\": \\\"arrow\\\",\\n      \\\"x\\\": 160,\\n      \\\"y\\\": 160,\\n      \\\"width\\\": 0,\\n      \\\"height\\\": 60,\\n      \\\"points\\\": [[0, 0], [0, 60]],\\n      \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\",\\n      \\\"endArrowhead\\\": \\\"arrow\\\",\\n      \\\"startBinding\\\": {\\\"elementId\\\": \\\"start\\\", \\\"focus\\\": 0, \\\"gap\\\": 5},\\n      \\\"endBinding\\\": {\\\"elementId\\\": \\\"end\\\", \\\"focus\\\": 0, \\\"gap\\\": 5}\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\\"id\\\": \\\"end\\\",\\n      \\\"type\\\": \\\"rectangle\\\",\\n      \\\"x\\\": 100,\\n      \\\"y\\\": 220,\\n      \\\"width\\\": 120,\\n      \\\"height\\\": 60,\\n      \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\",\\n      \\\"backgroundColor\\\": \\\"transparent\\\",\\n      \\\"boundElements\\\": [{\\\"id\\\": \\\"end-text\\\", \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\"}]\\n    },\\n    {\\n      \\\"id\\\": \\\"end-text\\\",\\n      \\\"type\\\": \\\"text\\\",\\n      \\\"x\\\": 140,\\n      \\\"y\\\": 235,\\n      \\\"text\\\": \\\"End\\\",\\n      \\\"fontSize\\\": 20,\\n      \\\"fontFamily\\\": 1,\\n      \\\"containerId\\\": \\\"end\\\",\\n      \\\"strokeColor\\\": \\\"#ffffff\\\"\\n    }\\n  ],\\n  \\\"appState\\\": {\\n    \\\"viewBackgroundColor\\\": \\\"#000000\\\",\\n    \\\"theme\\\": \\\"dark\\\"\\n  },\\n  \\\"files\\\": {}\\n}\\n```\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01332eKJKJVFKsyv5CQrcmuT","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":113769,"cache_write_tokens":1557,"cache_read_tokens":112211,"output_tokens":2555,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":1557,"cache_read_input_tokens":112211,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":2555}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:18:47.826820Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe
